results.rendered_html:
2. pratyāyana 1〉 die  ed. Bomb.  liest pratyāyakaṃ st. pratyāyane und  NĪLAK.  erklärt: eṣāṃ śulkavādināṃ pratyāyakaṃ bhāryātvajñāpakaṃ kimapi nāsti . pariṇayādeva bhāryā bhavati na śulkamātrāditi lokavyavahārasya spaṣṭatvādityarthaḥ.
— 2〉  SĀH. D. 109,21 .
